pending.body:
finding_summary: The new blocker bead points future work at source paths that do not exist in this repo. At `.beads/issues.jsonl:123`, `ralph-burning-lmm` lists `src/contexts/engine/`, `src/contexts/cli/`, and `src/contexts/conformance/`, but the actual code lives under `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs`, `src/cli/`, and `src/contexts/conformance_spec/`. Because `.beads/issues.jsonl` is the authoritative backlog, leaving broken file references here will misdirect the follow-up profiling work.
severity: low
affected_files:
- .beads/issues.jsonl
remediation_hint: Fix the `Files` section for `ralph-burning-lmm` to reference the real module paths, or remove the section until the exact ownership is known.

finding_summary: The branch includes a new `result:1` symlink target under `/nix/store/...`, which is just a machine-local build artifact. That file is already listed in `.gitignore:5`, so updating the tracked symlink adds meaningless churn and can leave other checkouts pointing at a non-existent store path.
severity: low
affected_files:
- result
remediation_hint: Drop the `result` symlink change from this branch. If the repository no longer intends to track `result`, clean that up separately.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 3 -> Plan and Implement
